mapper.select: select id, user_id, change_amount, type, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from wallet_balance_detail where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
select id, user_id, change_amount, type,create_time from wallet_balance_detail where 1 = 1 and is_deleted = 0 and user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into wallet_balance_detail(id,user_id, change_amount,now_amount, type, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{id},#{userId}, #{changeAmount},#{nowAmount}, #{type}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into wallet_balance_detail(id,user_id, change_amount, type, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.userId}, #{entity.changeAmount}, #{entity.type}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into wallet_balance_detail(id,user_id, change_amount, type, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.userId}, #{entity.changeAmount}, #{entity.type}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update user_id = values(user_id), change_amount = values(change_amount), type = values(type), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
